query:
ALTER TABLE quotation_batches 
ADD COLUMN grossWeight DECIMAL(10, 3),
ADD COLUMN netWeight DECIMAL(10, 3),
ADD COLUMN cbm DECIMAL(10, 3),
ADD COLUMN piecesPerBox INT DEFAULT 1;
